title: Editor

noGame.title: Editor — select a game
noGame.desc: Open the library and select a game with a config to view and edit its parameters.

noConfig.title: Config not found
noConfig.default: Specify the path to Saved/Config/Windows on the “Library” tab.

tabs.advancedHint: Engine.ini and CVars — for experienced users
tabs.backupsHint: Ini snapshots before apply and rollback

mode.basicBody: Settings like in the game — resolution, quality, sg.*. Writes only to GameUserSettings.ini.
mode.advancedBody: Fine engine tuning. May create or change Engine.ini / Scalability.ini. For experienced users.
mode.backupsBody: Automatic ini snapshots in `.uesm-backups`. Restore or reset to a clean config.

engineWarning.title: Advanced users only
engineWarning.body: Engine.ini CVars may conflict with in-game settings and sg.*, and break stability or performance.
engineWarning.backupHint: Create a backup before applying (Backups tab).
engineWarning.ackHint: Check “Got it” to dismiss this warning.
engineWarning.inline: Engine.ini: advanced CVars may conflict with in-game settings.

engineIni.title: Engine.ini parameters
engineIni.after: is whether the line exists in the file: on — the key will be written after “Apply”; off — the line is removed. Currently in Engine.ini: {{on}} of {{total}}.

emptyFiltered.descSearch: Try another query or switch the category.
emptyFiltered.descEmpty: This category has no parameters for the selected game.

gameRunningInline: Applying changes is disabled while the game is running.

errors.noChanges: No changes — enable Engine.ini parameters or change values.

applied: Applied {{count}} edits · backup {{backupId}}. Restart the game.

engineToggle.off: Off — the line is not in Engine.ini. Enable it and press “Apply” to add it.
engineToggle.on: On — the line is in Engine.ini. Disable it to remove it on apply.

sentinelHint: The ini holds −1: the game substitutes its own value. Set 0–4 or another number to fix it manually.

noDiff.title: No changes
noDiff.desc: The current ini files on disk match the selected preset.

diffCount_one: {{count}} change will be written to ini
diffCount_other: {{count}} changes will be written to ini
